title: Vertical Smartphone Night Westie Motorbike Alarm Dance Video
sourceTitle: Vertical Smartphone Night Westie Motorbike Alarm Dance Video AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 realistic smartphone footage at night featuring West Highland White Terrier with fluffy fur and playful paw steps beside parked electric motorbike with blinking alarm light. Subject: West Highland White Terrier with fluffy fur and playful paw steps reacts to the alarm and performs startled dog dancing to the rhythmic alarm with head bobbing, front paws waving, body swaying, small jumps, and silly turns, with dog bounces in rhythm when the alarm chirps, then looks at the camera as the meme-worthy viral beat. Scene: Quiet city street at night with parked electric motorbike, rhythmic alarm beeps, flashing lights, casual handheld phone-video viewpoint, and the person filming trying not to laugh. Composition: Handheld vertical phone framing with slight camera shake, subject beside the motorbike, flashing alarm lights visible, small jumps and silly turns kept inside frame, and slight motion blur during dance moves. Signature Elements: Preserved vertical smartphone night westie motorbike alarm dance video source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Authentic viral pet smartphone video vibe, realistic fur movement, natural night lighting, casual phone-camera compression, funny chaotic timing, and meme-ready realism. Color Palette: Night street neutrals, white terrier fur, electric motorbike dark tones, red/orange alarm flashes, cool streetlight blues, and phone-video highlights. Lighting: Natural night street lighting mixed with flashing alarm lights, mild motion blur, soft fur highlights, and handheld exposure changes. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Subject: West Highland White Terrier with fluffy fur and playful paw steps reacts to the alarm and performs startled dog dancing to the rhythmic alarm with head bobbing, front paws waving, body swaying, small jumps, and silly turns, with dog bounces in rhythm when the alarm chirps, then looks at the camera as the meme-worthy viral beat. Scene: Quiet city street at night with parked electric motorbike, rhythmic alarm beeps, flashing lights, casual handheld phone-video viewpoint, and the person filming trying not to laugh. Composition: Handheld vertical phone framing with slight camera shake, subject beside the motorbike, flashing alarm lights visible, small jumps and silly turns kept inside frame, and slight motion blur during dance moves. Signature Elements: Preserved vertical smartphone night westie motorbike alarm dance video source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Authentic viral pet smartphone video vibe, realistic fur movement, natural night lighting, casual phone-camera compression, funny chaotic timing, and meme-ready realism. Color Palette: Night street neutrals, white terrier fur, electric motorbike dark tones, red/orange alarm flashes, cool streetlight blues, and phone-video highlights. Lighting: Natural night street lighting mixed with flashing alarm lights, mild motion blur, soft fur highlights, and handheld exposure changes. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
